scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail -n vite,electron -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev:vite" "npm run dev:electron"
scripts.dev:electron: wait-on http://localhost:5173 && tsc && cross-env NODE_ENV=development electron .
scripts.build:frontend: cd ../frontend && npx tsc --noEmit && npx vite build --base ./
